overall.description: Game engine footage showing a player character walking around a maroon sedan in an open parking lot or airfield, then moving through rows of parked vehicles. The setting features industrial hangar buildings in the background under clear midday lighting with sharp shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: open concrete parking lot with industrial hangar buildings

agents.ego_description: walking clockwise around the stationary maroon sedan, examining it from front to rear

notable_agents.action: maroon sedan parked stationary while ego circles around it
blue sedan parked in the background

entered.detail: large gray industrial building with multiple bays in the background
expansive flat concrete parking surface with visible seams

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a player character circling a maroon sedan in a wide-open concrete parking lot. Industrial hangar buildings stand in the background under bright midday sun. The camera moves smoothly around the vehicle, showing its front, side, and rear profiles while other parked cars remain visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: vehicle parking lot with multiple rows of parked cars

events.description: camera moves over the roof of the maroon sedan, temporarily blocking the view with the vehicle's body
camera moves past the sedan and transitions to walking through the open parking lot between vehicle rows

agents.ego_description: moving past the maroon sedan and walking through the parking lot between rows of parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: maroon sedan now behind and to the left as ego walks away
white sedan parked in the row to the right

segments.scene_description: The camera climbs over the maroon sedan's roof causing a brief occlusion, then moves past the vehicle into the open parking lot. The ego walks forward between rows of parked cars while the industrial hangar shifts to the left side of the frame. The scene opens up to show multiple vehicles parked in the expansive concrete lot.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a close inspection of a single vehicle and expands into a wide view of a crowded industrial parking lot. It begins by smoothly circling a maroon sedan, capturing its profiles against a backdrop of distant cars and large hangar buildings under the bright midday sun. As the camera climbs over the roof of the sedan, a brief occlusion occurs before the view clears to reveal the expansive concrete lot beyond. The scene then opens up as the camera moves forward between rows of parked vehicles, causing the industrial hangars to shift toward the left side of the frame. Finally, the perspective widens to encompass the scale of the lot and the multiple cars stationed across the open terrain.
